title: P11 Lug-First Memory: if work state is not in a lug, the next agent starts blind
description: TaskCreate calls, scratch md files, and in-head state do not survive session ends. Only WAI-Lugs.jsonl is read on wakeup. All work state, subagent prompts, and handoff context must be in lugs.
rationale: Discovered when recovering an interrupted session — the only recoverable state was what had been put in lugs. TaskCreate entries and scratch files were gone. The principle was dogfooded via cold-start sub-agent before adoption.
